caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt that reads "I CON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" speaks into a professional black microphone. He is positioned in a room filled with framed photographs on the wall and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt behind him to the right. To his left, a logo featuring the text "99" inside a circle is visible, and a red logo that says "BORELLY BOT" appears on the right side of the screen. As the scene progresses, the man gesticulates with his right hand, lifting it higher and opening his palm while continuing to speak. His facial expression remains focused as he looks slightly off-camera. The background remains static, and the lighting is consistent across the sequence.
